zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes MacDonald於大約1400年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾時，她的父親Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles41歲，母親Mariota Leslie38歲。她和John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne至少有2個女兒。她去世於1463年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes MacDonald was born about 1400, in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, her father, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, was 41 and her mother, Mariota Leslie, was 38. She had at least 2 daughters with John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne. She died in 1463, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes MacDonald est née environ 1400, à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mariota Leslie, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes MacDonald um 1400 in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles 41 und ihre Mutter Mariota Leslie 38. Sie hatte mit John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes MacDonald è nata il circa 1400 nel Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mariota Leslie, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne. Morì nel 1463, nel Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes MacDonaldが約1400年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルで生まれた時，父Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Islesは41歳，母Mariota Leslieは38歳であった。彼女はJohn Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1463年にスコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで64歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes MacDonald(이)가 대략 1400년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariota Leslie(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 스컷랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes MacDonald nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mariota Leslie, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes MacDonald родилась около 1400 г. в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mariota Leslie, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes MacDonald nació aproximadamente 1400, en Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mariota Leslie, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con John Stewart 2nd Lord of Lorne. Murió en 1463, en Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.
